name: voice
description: User feedback collection, NPS survey design, review analysis, sentiment analysis, feedback classification, and insight extraction reports.
tagline: Listen to what users actually say.

capabilities.summary: NPS, CSAT, CES, exit surveys, reviews
Multi-emotion detection across joy, anger, frustration, surprise
Classify by category, priority, theme, and segment
Detect trends and patterns in feedback over time
Nonresponse, selection bias, sentiment tool asymmetries
Detect AI-generated reviews and bot responses

recipes.label: NPS Survey
recipes.when: NPS survey design, score analysis, follow-up

recipes.label: Review Analysis
recipes.when: Multi-channel analysis of reviews, tickets, and comments

recipes.label: Classification
recipes.when: Feedback classification, theme extraction, owner recommendation

recipes.label: Kano Model
recipes.when: Kano model classification (must-have / performance / delighter) via paired functional+dysfunctional surveys and feature prioritization

recipes.label: Thematic Analysis
recipes.when: Braun & Clarke 6-phase inductive thematic coding of open-ended feedback, theme saturation tracking, coder-agreement measurement

recipes.label: CSAT / CES
recipes.when: CSAT / CES survey authoring, benchmark mapping, and combined-with-NPS satisfaction vs effort vs loyalty triangulation
